description_long: This sculpture features a dynamic arrangement of human figures, with one seated figure at the top and several others intertwined below, appearing to climb or support each other. The forms are stylized and somewhat abstract, with smooth, flowing contours and minimal facial or anatomical detail. The figures are arranged on a roughly square base that mimics natural terrain or rock. The entire piece is rendered in a uniform, matte white material, giving it a monolithic and cohesive appearance. The composition suggests movement and interaction among the figures, with limbs and bodies overlapping in a complex, upward-reaching structure. The sculpture's surface is hard and slightly rough, typical of cast stone or plaster.
description: A white, stylized sculpture of multiple intertwined human figures arranged in a dynamic, upward-reaching composition on a square base. The forms are smooth and abstract, with a matte finish.
description_view_0: From this view, the back of the top seated figure is visible, along with the outstretched limbs of the lower figures cascading down the base.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the profile of the top figure and the layered arrangement of the figures below, emphasizing the verticality of the composition.
description_view_2: The front view shows the faces and torsos of the figures, with the top figure looking forward and the lower figures supporting or reaching upward.
description_view_3: This angle reveals the side and partial back of the top figure, with the lower figures' limbs extending outward and downward.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
